passages.text: You didn’t sleep a wink last night. [[6.2]]
passages.cleanText: You didn’t sleep a wink last night.

passages.text: But duty calls. [[6.3]]
passages.cleanText: But duty calls.

passages.text: Not your old duty. Your new, greater duty. Your duty to find the truth. [[6.4]]
passages.cleanText: Not your old duty. Your new, greater duty. Your duty to find the truth.

passages.text: You tear letters out of their envelopes. [[6.5]]
passages.cleanText: You tear letters out of their envelopes.

passages.text: Dozens are covered in Arcane symbols. Alchemical signs. Pentagrams and sun crosses and Eyes of Providence. [[6.6]]
passages.cleanText: Dozens are covered in Arcane symbols. Alchemical signs. Pentagrams and sun crosses and Eyes of Providence.

passages.text: The others… [[6.7]]
passages.cleanText: The others…

passages.text: //We can’t let anybody know how we do it.// [[6.7.5]]
passages.cleanText: //We can’t let anybody know how we do it.//

passages.text: No… this can’t be… [[6.9]]
passages.cleanText: No… this can’t be…

passages.text: //If he asks, don’t let him see your notebook.// [[6.8]]
passages.cleanText: //If he asks, don’t let him see your notebook.//

passages.text: //Have you spoken to the mailmouse? Marty?// [[6.10]]
passages.cleanText: //Have you spoken to the mailmouse? Marty?//

passages.text: //I fear he's discovered our secret.// [[6.11]]
passages.cleanText: //I fear he's discovered our secret.//
No... NO!

passages.text: As you look down at your paw, you can see it morphing. The pinky grows, the fur fades away. [[6.13]]
passages.cleanText: As you look down at your paw, you can see it morphing. The pinky grows, the fur fades away.

passages.text: The word for this appendage appears in your mind. [[6.14]]
passages.cleanText: The word for this appendage appears in your mind.
"Hand."
NO!

passages.text: You are outside now. [[6.16.5]]
passages.cleanText: You are outside now.

passages.text: The eye appears in the sky.
passages.cleanText: The eye appears in the sky.

passages.text: The sun opens into an eye, joining the moon.
passages.cleanText: The sun opens into an eye, joining the moon.

passages.text: But no one can see it. No one will trust you. [[6.20]]
passages.cleanText: But no one can see it. No one will trust you.

passages.text: But surely there s someone you can talk to... [[6.21]]
passages.cleanText: But surely there s someone you can talk to...

passages.text: MATTHEW!! [[6.22]]
passages.cleanText: MATTHEW!!

passages.text: What is it?! [[6.23]]
passages.cleanText: What is it?!

passages.text: I've figured it out. [[6.24]]
passages.cleanText: I've figured it out.

passages.text: Everybody in this town, they've been... [[6.25]]
passages.cleanText: Everybody in this town, they've been...

passages.text: They've been keeping secrets from us. They've been lying to us! [[6.26]]
passages.cleanText: They've been keeping secrets from us. They've been lying to us!

passages.text: And when I start asking questions, they get mad! [[6.27]]
passages.cleanText: And when I start asking questions, they get mad!

passages.text: I don't understand, Marty. We should go home and- [[6.28]]
passages.cleanText: I don't understand, Marty. We should go home and-

passages.text: DON'T YOU GET IT? HOME ISN'T REAL NONE OF THIS IS REAL, MATTHEW! [[6.29]]
passages.cleanText: DON'T YOU GET IT? HOME ISN'T REAL NONE OF THIS IS REAL, MATTHEW!

passages.text: The town, the tea, the food... maybe even some of the people! [[6.30]]
passages.cleanText: The town, the tea, the food... maybe even some of the people!

passages.text: This world isn't real, Matthew! It's.. I don't know! A book, a movie, a theater show, SOMETHING! [[6.31]]
passages.cleanText: This world isn't real, Matthew! It's.. I don't know! A book, a movie, a theater show, SOMETHING!

passages.text: Whatever it is, we've been trapped inside! [[6.32]]
passages.cleanText: Whatever it is, we've been trapped inside!

passages.text: We need to leave, Matthew! NOW! Before they stop us! [[6.33]]
passages.cleanText: We need to leave, Matthew! NOW! Before they stop us!
Marty...

passages.text: PLEASE, you have to listen! [[6.36]]
passages.cleanText: PLEASE, you have to listen!

passages.text: That tea they keep giving me... it's a potion! [[6.37]]
passages.cleanText: That tea they keep giving me... it's a potion!

passages.text: It keeps me from seeing what's real! [[6.38]]
passages.cleanText: It keeps me from seeing what's real!

passages.text: We're being //watched//, Matthew! Watched from the sky! [[6.39]]
passages.cleanText: We're being //watched//, Matthew! Watched from the sky!

passages.text: And whatever's watching us, it wants to help us escape! [[6.40]]
passages.cleanText: And whatever's watching us, it wants to help us escape!

passages.text: //Now//, Matthew We need to //GO//! [[6.41]]
passages.cleanText: //Now//, Matthew We need to //GO//!
Marty...

passages.text: I.. I'm sorry. [[6.43]]
passages.cleanText: I.. I'm sorry.

passages.text: I shouldn't have let things get this far. [[6.44]]
passages.cleanText: I shouldn't have let things get this far.

passages.text: I can't go with you. I.. can't let you go, either. [[6.45]]
passages.cleanText: I can't go with you. I.. can't let you go, either.

passages.text: I need to take you to a doctor, Marty. [[6.46]]
passages.cleanText: I need to take you to a doctor, Marty.

passages.text: I need to take you to a doctor because... [[6.47]]
passages.cleanText: I need to take you to a doctor because...

passages.text: I'm one of them. [[6.48]]
passages.cleanText: I'm one of them.

passages.text: Marty, how long have we been friends? [[6.49]]
passages.cleanText: Marty, how long have we been friends?

passages.text: How many times have we had lunch together, talked about books? How many times did we play as kids? [[6.50]]
passages.cleanText: How many times have we had lunch together, talked about books? How many times did we play as kids?

passages.text: Listen, Marty. [[6.51]]
passages.cleanText: Listen, Marty.

passages.text: I'm your best friend. [[6.52]]
passages.cleanText: I'm your best friend.

passages.text: But there are some things I could never let you know. [[6.53]]
passages.cleanText: But there are some things I could never let you know.

passages.text: Because you're important, Marty. [[6.54]]
passages.cleanText: Because you're important, Marty.

passages.text: You're the key to all of this. [[6.55]]
passages.cleanText: You're the key to all of this.

passages.text: So, from one old friend to another... [[6.56]]
passages.cleanText: So, from one old friend to another...

passages.text: Don't resist. [[6.57]]
passages.cleanText: Don't resist.

passages.text: Your legs twitch. [[6.58]]
passages.cleanText: Your legs twitch.

passages.text: You run. [[6.59]]
passages.cleanText: You run.

passages.text: Suddenly you're at Peaches house. [[6.60]]
passages.cleanText: Suddenly you're at Peaches house.

passages.text: Peaches. Those kids she never lets you see. [[6.61]]
passages.cleanText: Peaches. Those kids she never lets you see.

passages.text: Perhaps there's a reason why she's never let you see them. [[6.62]]
passages.cleanText: Perhaps there's a reason why she's never let you see them.

passages.text: That's it! They're wolves too! Just more wolves in sheep's clothing... [[6.63]]
passages.cleanText: That's it! They're wolves too! Just more wolves in sheep's clothing...

passages.text: Marty, what are you... Marty wa- Stop- MARTY! [[6.64]]
passages.cleanText: Marty, what are you... Marty wa- Stop- MARTY!

passages.text: The child's skin is not the soft fur you would expect, but smooth, sticky flesh. [[6.65]]
passages.cleanText: The child's skin is not the soft fur you would expect, but smooth, sticky flesh.

passages.text: It's head is perfectly round, its arms ending in paws without claws. Another "hand." [[6.66]]
passages.cleanText: It's head is perfectly round, its arms ending in paws without claws. Another "hand."

passages.text: The eyes are blue. ringed in white. [[6.67]]
passages.cleanText: The eyes are blue. ringed in white.

passages.text: They look strangely familiar... [[6.68]]
passages.cleanText: They look strangely familiar...

passages.tags: peaches-speaker marty-enter peaches-enter-right peaches-angry marty-scared casserole_avenue peaches-baby-leave
passages.text: GET YOUR PAWS AWAY FROM THEM! [[6.69]]
passages.cleanText: GET YOUR PAWS AWAY FROM THEM!

passages.text: HELP! ANYBODY! PLEASE! I'M BEING ATTACKED! [[6.70]]
passages.cleanText: HELP! ANYBODY! PLEASE! I'M BEING ATTACKED!

passages.text: Peaches appears to be a little upset. [[6.71]]
passages.cleanText: Peaches appears to be a little upset.

passages.text: This is what she was hiding. [[6.73]]
passages.cleanText: This is what she was hiding.

passages.text: No wonder she tried so much to avoid you. [[6.74]]
passages.cleanText: No wonder she tried so much to avoid you.

passages.text: There's no telling what she could be hiding under that fur of hers... [[6.75]]
passages.cleanText: There's no telling what she could be hiding under that fur of hers...

passages.text: Suddenly you're tackled from behind. [[6.76]]
passages.cleanText: Suddenly you're tackled from behind.

passages.text: Matthew has knocked you to the ground. His breath stinks of meat. [[6.77]]
passages.cleanText: Matthew has knocked you to the ground. His breath stinks of meat.

passages.text: You pry yourself free, but more are coming. [[6.78]]
passages.cleanText: You pry yourself free, but more are coming.

passages.text: They pin you down. They've won. [[6.79]]
passages.cleanText: They pin you down. They've won.

passages.text: Just when it seems you won't be able to hold out any longer, the world splits. [[6.80]]
passages.cleanText: Just when it seems you won't be able to hold out any longer, the world splits.

passages.text: The "people" of the real world are here. [[6.81]]
passages.cleanText: The "people" of the real world are here.

passages.text: You've broken the chains on your mind. Now they will break the chains on your body. [[6.82]]
passages.cleanText: You've broken the chains on your mind. Now they will break the chains on your body.

passages.text: An enormous hand blots out of the tear in Honey Haven. [[6.83]]
passages.cleanText: An enormous hand blots out of the tear in Honey Haven.

passages.text: It reaches across to you, it's palm open. [[6.84]]
passages.cleanText: It reaches across to you, it's palm open.

passages.text:
Step into the hand? 
[[Yes -> 6.85a]]
[[No -> 6.85b]]
passages.cleanText: Step into the hand?

passages.name: 6.85a
passages.text: You step into the hand. [[6.86a]]
passages.cleanText: You step into the hand.

passages.name: 6.85b
passages.text: The hand gently beckons you. [[6.86b]]
passages.cleanText: The hand gently beckons you.

passages.name: 6.86a
passages.text: It pulls you into the tear. It feels.. comforting. [[6.87a]]
passages.cleanText: It pulls you into the tear. It feels.. comforting.

passages.name: 6.87a
passages.text: Your vision fades to black. [[6.88]]
passages.cleanText: Your vision fades to black.

passages.name: 6.86b
passages.text:
Step into the hand? 
[[Yes -> 6.85a]]
[[No -> 6.85c]]
passages.cleanText: Step into the hand?

passages.name: 6.85c
passages.text: The hand beckons you once more. [[6.86c]]
passages.cleanText: The hand beckons you once more.

passages.name: 6.86c
passages.text: You start backing away. Why are you backing away? [[6.87c]]
passages.cleanText: You start backing away. Why are you backing away?

passages.name: 6.87c
passages.text: The hand covers you with its palm, then slowly and softly presses you into the blackness of the earth. [[6.88]]
passages.cleanText: The hand covers you with its palm, then slowly and softly presses you into the blackness of the earth.

passages.text: Why.. can't I move my head? Where's.. my body? [[6.88.5]]
passages.cleanText: Why.. can't I move my head? Where's.. my body?

passages.text: When did you grow up? [[6.90]]
passages.cleanText: When did you grow up?

passages.text: It feels like just yesterday you were a wee little pup, taking your first steps... [[6.91]]
passages.cleanText: It feels like just yesterday you were a wee little pup, taking your first steps...

passages.text: Going to school, getting a job, building a quaint little life for yourself. [[6.92]]
passages.cleanText: Going to school, getting a job, building a quaint little life for yourself.

passages.text: And now, look at you. [[6.93]]
passages.cleanText: And now, look at you.

passages.text: In less than a week, it's all gone. [[6.94]]
passages.cleanText: In less than a week, it's all gone.

passages.text: You've caught on now, haven't you? [[6.95]]
passages.cleanText: You've caught on now, haven't you?

passages.text: I'm always sure to start small. [[6.96]]
passages.cleanText: I'm always sure to start small.

passages.text: A strange dream or two. [[6.97]]
passages.cleanText: A strange dream or two.

passages.text: A reflection in the mirror. [[6.98]]
passages.cleanText: A reflection in the mirror.

passages.text: Then let the town do the rest. [[6.99]]
passages.cleanText: Then let the town do the rest.

passages.text: Those arrogant little snacks are so afraid of everyone knowing their secrets... [[6.100]]
passages.cleanText: Those arrogant little snacks are so afraid of everyone knowing their secrets...

passages.text: Their neighbors. Their families. Honey Haven~ [[6.101]]
passages.cleanText: Their neighbors. Their families. Honey Haven~

passages.text: You just need to prod them a little and they'll start seeing demons in everything. [[6.102]]
passages.cleanText: You just need to prod them a little and they'll start seeing demons in everything.

passages.text: ehehehehe... [[6.103]]
passages.cleanText: ehehehehe...

passages.text: Even though the only one was right here. [[6.104]]
passages.cleanText: Even though the only one was right here.

passages.text: Once that starts, I'll seed some suspicions. [[6.105]]
passages.cleanText: Once that starts, I'll seed some suspicions.

passages.text: Help them view the town from a....  different perspective. [[6.106]]
passages.cleanText: Help them view the town from a....  different perspective.

passages.text: That eye in the sky was a personal touch. [[6.107]]
passages.cleanText: That eye in the sky was a personal touch.

passages.text: It was nice, looking down at my meal. [[6.108]]
passages.cleanText: It was nice, looking down at my meal.

passages.text: Making it think I was a savior. [[6.109]]
passages.cleanText: Making it think I was a savior.

passages.text: And once they start thinking Honey Haven isn't real, they'll believe anything they hear. [[6.110]]
passages.cleanText: And once they start thinking Honey Haven isn't real, they'll believe anything they hear.

passages.text: Once you push everyone away, there's nobody left to tell you you're going crazy. [[6.111]]
passages.cleanText: Once you push everyone away, there's nobody left to tell you you're going crazy.

passages.text: Then all you've got is that damnable tea.... [[6.112]]
passages.cleanText: Then all you've got is that damnable tea....

passages.text: ehehehe... You know, you could have saved yourself if you had just kept drinking it? [[6.113]]
passages.cleanText: ehehehe... You know, you could have saved yourself if you had just kept drinking it?

passages.text: Honey flower.. perhaps it could have worked. [[6.114]]
passages.cleanText: Honey flower.. perhaps it could have worked.

passages.text: Oh, but you just HAD to keep looking, didn't you? [[6.115]]
passages.cleanText: Oh, but you just HAD to keep looking, didn't you?

passages.text: So I gave you something to find. My writing. All the town's dirty laundry, all at once. [[6.116]]
passages.cleanText: So I gave you something to find. My writing. All the town's dirty laundry, all at once.

passages.text: And for my final act.. a wolf in sheep's clothing. [[6.117]]
passages.cleanText: And for my final act.. a wolf in sheep's clothing.

passages.text: It always astounds me how easy you creatures are to trick. [[6.118]]
passages.cleanText: It always astounds me how easy you creatures are to trick.

passages.text: Invade your mind a little each night and they'll do the work for you. [[6.119]]
passages.cleanText: Invade your mind a little each night and they'll do the work for you.

passages.text: Push away their friends. Abandon their lives. [[6.120]]
passages.cleanText: Push away their friends. Abandon their lives.

passages.text: Kill themselves searching for a truth that isn't there. [[6.121]]
passages.cleanText: Kill themselves searching for a truth that isn't there.
ehehehe...

passages.text: You paranoid little rat. [[6.123]]
passages.cleanText: You paranoid little rat.

passages.text: You shoved them all away for.. the sake of a lie. [[6.124]]
passages.cleanText: You shoved them all away for.. the sake of a lie.

passages.text: For HERE. [[6.125]]
passages.cleanText: For HERE.

passages.text: ehehehehehehe will they even remember you? [[6.126]]
passages.cleanText: ehehehehehehe will they even remember you?

passages.text: They've certainly been trying to forget Jonathan. [[6.127]]
passages.cleanText: They've certainly been trying to forget Jonathan.

passages.text: You.. you're even less alive than he is! [[6.128]]
passages.cleanText: You.. you're even less alive than he is!
HA!

passages.text: Goodbye, Marty. [[6.130]]
passages.cleanText: Goodbye, Marty.

passages.text: You were a fun one. [[6.131]]
passages.cleanText: You were a fun one.

passages.text: End of Day 3.
passages.cleanText: End of Day 3.

passages.text: Hello Marty. [[6.89]]
passages.cleanText: Hello Marty.

passages.text: You feel... different. You see things. You're starting to understand things. [[6.19]]
passages.cleanText: You feel... different. You see things. You're starting to understand things.
